title: matgpr: Physics-informed Gaussian Process Regression for materials informatics
description: matgpr is a materials-informatics toolkit for Gaussian Process Regression workflows, including standard and physics-informed GPR, uncertainty-aware prediction, materials featurization, multitask and multi-fidelity modeling, and finite-pool Bayesian optimization for next-experiment selection.
notes: For example notebooks and datasets, also cite the original literature sources listed in the example reports, dataset cards, and model cards.
